creator: mph@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Not a bug.  Ports are only physically located in the first entry 
of the CATEGORIES line.  The others on that line are "virtual", indicating 
that they are also relevant.  Compare "x11" which appears on several 
CATEGORIES lines outside of ports/x11.  Likewise, "tk80" and friends 
which do not even have associated directories under /usr/ports.
